description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a long, rectangular footprint and a dark, gable roof. The exterior walls are clad in what appears to be wood or brick, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The roof features multiple chimneys and skylights, suggesting the presence of fireplaces and natural lighting inside. There is a covered porch area at one end, supported by columns, providing a sheltered entryway. The windows are arranged in a linear pattern along the longer sides, with a paved walkway leading up to the entrance. The bungalow sits on a neatly manicured lawn with a paved perimeter, typical of suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, rectangular bungalow with a dark gable roof, multiple chimneys, and a covered porch, surrounded by a lawn and paved walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and a paved walkway leading up to the door.
description_view_1: Side gable view highlighting the depth of the roof and the covered porch area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with a row of windows and multiple chimneys on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite gable end view, showing the rear covered area and the paved path extending from the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with linear side windows
